## Test Evidence

- [ ] Focused failing test was observed before implementation
- [ ] Focused test passes
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes when build behavior changed

## Security Review

- [ ] Unknown or invalid repository actions fail closed
- [ ] High-risk code changes require approval
- [ ] Approval-required changes cannot execute before approval
- [ ] Sensitive values are redacted from audit logs
- [ ] No GitHub adapter bypasses AgentGate decisions
